payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark-stained wooden display cabinet with several horizontal shelves and turned vertical spindles/balusters between shelves, holding assorted dishes, small figurines and decorative objects; the cabinet is seen through a white door/frame and is cropped at the image edge, approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wooden display cabinet partial","long_description":"Partial view of a dark-stained wooden display cabinet with several horizontal shelves and turned vertical spindles/balusters between shelves, holding assorted dishes, small figurines and decorative objects; the cabinet is seen through a white door/frame and is cropped at the image edge, approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark-stained wood","multiple horizontal shelves","turned vertical spindles/balusters","contains dishes and figurines","partially cropped/edge of frame","viewed through white door frame"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
